query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://images.unsplash%' THEN 'unsplash'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://images.pexels%' THEN 'pexels'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront%' THEN 'cloudfront_cdn'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://storage.googleapis%' THEN 'google_storage'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://cdn%' THEN 'cdn'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://oaidalleapiprodscus%' THEN 'dalle'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'https://%.blob.core%' THEN 'azure_blob'
    WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'data:%' THEN 'data_uri'
    ELSE SUBSTRING("imageUrl", 1, 60)
  END as url_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM recipes
WHERE "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != ''
GROUP BY url_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
